vulnerabilities.description: There is no explicit use of security middleware such as Helmet, CORS configuration with a whitelist, and rate-limiting in the provided code.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet for setting HTTP headers, configure CORS with a specific whitelist of domains, and use a rate-limiting library like express-rate-limit to prevent abuse.

vulnerabilities.description: There is no implementation of RBAC or ABAC to ensure secure access control based on user roles and permissions.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement middleware to check for user permissions based on roles (RBAC) or attributes (ABAC) for endpoints handling administrative actions such as creating groups and linking Telegram accounts.
